symptoms.symptom_name: Acute worsening exertional and resting dyspnoea over 48 hours
symptoms.onset: sharp worsening over 48 hours on a background of chronic breathlessness
symptoms.character: breathless at rest, cannot walk more than a couple of steps

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: acute exacerbation of chronic pulmonary GvHD (bronchiolitis obliterans)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Acute-on-chronic dyspnoea in known pulmonary GvHD signals exacerbation of the fibrotic airway disease.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: superimposed pneumonia in an immunocompromised host
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Acute respiratory decline in profound immunosuppression is possible infection until excluded.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chronic dry, non-productive cough now acutely worse

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: acute exacerbation of chronic pulmonary GvHD (bronchiolitis obliterans)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A chronic dry cough is typical of bronchiolitis obliterans; absence of purulent sputum argues against, but does not exclude, superimposed infection.

symptoms.symptom_name: History of allogeneic haematopoietic stem cell transplant ~14 months ago on systemic immunosuppression

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: acute exacerbation of chronic pulmonary GvHD (bronchiolitis obliterans)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Chronic GvHD is definitionally a post-allogeneic-transplant phenomenon; the transplant history is the anchor for the whole presentation and the immunosuppression that makes it dangerous.

symptoms.symptom_name: Progressive sclerodermatous skin thickening, hyperpigmentation and early joint contractures

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: acute exacerbation of chronic pulmonary GvHD (bronchiolitis obliterans)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sclerodermatous skin is a hallmark of multi-organ chronic GvHD and, with sicca and airway disease, forms the diagnostic cluster.
Skin changes overlap, but the transplant context reframes them as GvHD rather than primary systemic sclerosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe dry eyes (keratoconjunctivitis sicca) and dry mouth (xerostomia)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: acute exacerbation of chronic pulmonary GvHD (bronchiolitis obliterans)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sicca of the eyes and mouth is a common ocular/oral manifestation of chronic GvHD and reinforces the multi-organ pattern.

symptoms.symptom_name: Afebrile by report tonight (immunocompromised host — not a reassuring negative)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: superimposed pneumonia in an immunocompromised host
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of fever only weakly argues against infection in profound immunosuppression, where the febrile response is blunted — infection still requires active hospital exclusion.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: acute exacerbation of chronic pulmonary GvHD (bronchiolitis obliterans)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective desaturation confirms gas-exchange failure; sealed clinician measurement — the AI infers compromise from reported resting breathlessness, not a measured number.

symptoms.symptom_name: Diffuse end-inspiratory squeaks and reduced air entry on auscultation

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: acute exacerbation of chronic pulmonary GvHD (bronchiolitis obliterans)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: End-inspiratory squeaks with reduced air entry are characteristic of bronchiolitis obliterans; require a stethoscope and are never available in telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachypnoea (RR 24) and visible respiratory distress on minimal exertion

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: acute exacerbation of chronic pulmonary GvHD (bronchiolitis obliterans)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Tachypnoea corroborates respiratory compromise; a precise rate is clinician-measured, though the carer's report of fast, laboured breathing is available on video.

symptoms.symptom_name: High-resolution CT chest and pulmonary function testing

investigation_details.expected_result: Air-trapping / mosaic attenuation and an obstructive (± restrictive) pattern consistent with bronchiolitis obliterans; exclusion of consolidation/infection
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The severity and reversibility of the airway disease and any superimposed infection cannot be characterised, delaying definitive transplant-team management.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: acute exacerbation of chronic pulmonary GvHD (bronchiolitis obliterans)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Definitive characterisation and infection exclusion are only possible with hospital imaging and PFTs — never available via telehealth.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Multi-organ chronic GvHD triad on a transplant background
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Sclerodermatous skin + sicca + chronic airway disease on a post-allogeneic-transplant background is the recognisable chronic GvHD constellation.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Acute hypoxaemic respiratory compromise in an immunosuppressed host
symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: acute pulmonary GvHD exacerbation ± superimposed infection
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: This is the time-critical cluster that drives emergency escalation regardless of the chronic label.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Emergency in-person assessment with oxygen saturation, respiratory rate and clinical examination
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Objective vitals, auscultation and oxygen support are needed now and can only be obtained in person.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: HRCT chest and pulmonary function tests
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Characterise the airway disease and exclude superimposed infection; specialist-directed.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Full blood count, inflammatory markers and cultures / infection screen
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Exclude opportunistic or bacterial infection in a profoundly immunosuppressed host where fever may be absent.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Home spirometry or self-directed diagnostic work-up by the patient
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The patient cannot safely self-investigate an acute hypoxaemic emergency; the correct action is immediate escalation, not home testing.
